admin_scope_global_or_track.name: admin_scope_global_or_track
admin_scope_global_or_track.value: (is_global AND (track_id IS NULL)) OR ((NOT is_global) AND (track_id IS NOT NULL))

alert_resolved_matches_timestamp.name: alert_resolved_matches_timestamp
alert_resolved_matches_timestamp.value: ((NOT resolved) AND (resolved_at IS NULL)) OR (resolved AND (resolved_at IS NOT NULL))

unique_announcement_role_audience.name: unique_announcement_role_audience
unique_announcement_role_audience.where: ((track_id IS NULL) AND (role_id IS NOT NULL))

unique_announcement_role_track_audience.name: unique_announcement_role_track_audience
unique_announcement_role_track_audience.where: ((role_id IS NOT NULL) AND (track_id IS NOT NULL))

unique_announcement_track_audience.name: unique_announcement_track_audience
unique_announcement_track_audience.where: ((role_id IS NULL) AND (track_id IS NOT NULL))

announcement_audience_requires_role_or_t.name: announcement_audience_requires_role_or_track
announcement_audience_requires_role_or_t.value: (role_id IS NOT NULL) OR (track_id IS NOT NULL)

event_rsvp_response_state_valid.name: event_rsvp_response_state_valid
event_rsvp_response_state_valid.value: (responded_at IS NULL) OR ((rsvp_status)::text = ANY ((ARRAY['going'::character varying, 'maybe'::character varying, 'declined'::character varying])::text[]))

cannot_verify_expired_certificate.name: cannot_verify_expired_certificate
cannot_verify_expired_certificate.value: (expires_at IS NULL) OR (expires_at >= statement_timestamp()) OR (NOT verified)

unique_resource_role_audience.name: unique_resource_role_audience
unique_resource_role_audience.where: ((track_id IS NULL) AND (role_id IS NOT NULL))

unique_resource_role_track_audience.name: unique_resource_role_track_audience
unique_resource_role_track_audience.where: ((role_id IS NOT NULL) AND (track_id IS NOT NULL))

unique_resource_track_audience.name: unique_resource_track_audience
unique_resource_track_audience.where: ((role_id IS NULL) AND (track_id IS NOT NULL))

resource_audience_requires_role_or_track.name: resource_audience_requires_role_or_track
resource_audience_requires_role_or_track.value: (role_id IS NOT NULL) OR (track_id IS NOT NULL)

no_self_supervision.name: no_self_supervision
no_self_supervision.value: (supervisor_user_id IS NULL) OR (NOT ((student_user_id = supervisor_user_id) AND (supervisor_user_id IS NOT NULL)))
